meta.name: 雅思词汇真经
meta.source: my-ielts project - 雅思词汇真经（逻辑词群记忆法）

examples.en: The approaching examination created a tense atmosphere on the campus
examples.zh: 考试临近，校园气氛紧张

examples.en: All the water of the earth's surface is included in the hydrosphere
examples.zh: 地球表面的所有水都包含在水圈中

examples.en: The hydrosphere and the lithosphere together form the earth's surface
examples.zh: 水圈和岩石圈共同形成地球表面

examples.en: Hydrogen and Oxygen are gases
examples.zh: 氢气和氧气都是气体

examples.en: Oxide is a part of our daily life
examples.zh: 氧化物是我们日常生活的一部分

examples.en: Soft drinks usually contain carbon dioxide
examples.zh: 软饮料通常含有二氧化碳

examples.en: Two parts hydrogen, one part oxygen, you'll get water everytime
examples.zh: 两份氢气，一份氧气，每次都会得到水

examples.en: He is the core of the working group
examples.zh: 他是工作组的核心

examples.en: The crust on the snow was thick enough for us to walk on it
examples.zh: 雪上的外壳很厚，足以让我们在上面行走

examples.en: Parents often use mantles for their babies to keep warm
examples.zh: 父母经常给宝宝盖被子保暖

examples.en: The captain determine the latitude and longitude of his ship
examples.zh: 船长确定他的船的纬度和经度

examples.en: Our position is 40 degrees north latitude
examples.zh: 我们的位置是北纬40度

examples.en: I could see a ship on the horizon
examples.zh: 我可以看到地平线上有一艘船

examples.en: We're currently flying at an altitude of 8,000 meters
examples.zh: 我们目前飞行高度为8000米

examples.en: There was a great flood disaster in East China
examples.zh: 华东地区发生特大洪涝灾害

examples.en: A mishap prevented him from attending the routine company meeting
examples.zh: 一次意外使他无法参加公司例行会议

examples.en: If the forecast had been wrong, the consequences could have been catastrophic
examples.zh: 如果预测错误，后果可能是灾难性的

examples.en: A hurricane would be a calamity for this low-lying coastal region
examples.zh: 飓风对这个地势低洼的沿海地区来说将是一场灾难

examples.en: If you are work hard without rest, you will endanger your health
examples.zh: 如果你不休息地努力工作，就会危害你的健康

examples.en: If you are rude to the boss, your chances of success may be jeopardised
examples.zh: 如果你对老板无礼，你成功的机会可能会受到损害

examples.en: Jealousy is an extremely destructive emotion
examples.zh: 嫉妒是一种极具破坏性的情绪

examples.en: What changed the equation that year was El Nino
examples.zh: 那年改变方程式的是厄尔尼诺现象

examples.en: The flowers are grown in the greenhouse
examples.zh: 这些花是在温室里种植的

examples.en: Snow is an almost unknown phenomenon in Egypt
examples.zh: 下雪在埃及几乎是一种未知的现象

examples.en: The boy put his hand into the money bag and drew out a pebble
examples.zh: 男孩把手伸进钱袋子里，掏出一块小石子。

examples.en: He picked all the pins up with a magnet
examples.zh: 他用磁铁把所有的别针都吸起来了

examples.en: This mountain area is rich in iron ore
examples.zh: 这个山区盛产铁矿

examples.en: China is rich in mineral resources
examples.zh: 中国矿产资源丰富

examples.en: They used marble to build the steps
examples.zh: 他们用大理石建造台阶

examples.en: Have you bought the quartz clock?
examples.zh: 你买石英钟了吗？

examples.en: His grave is made of granite
examples.zh: 他的坟墓是用花岗岩建造的

examples.en: A gust of wind blew the leaves off the trees
examples.zh: 一阵风吹走了树上的叶子

examples.en: We are enjoying the cool breeze that comes from the lake
examples.zh: 我们享受着从湖边吹来的凉爽的微风

examples.en: The monsoon brings rain to us
examples.zh: 季风给我们带来雨水

examples.en: We got our roof blown off in a gale last night
examples.zh: 昨晚我们的屋顶被大风吹走了

examples.en: The hurricane flung their motorboat upon the rocks
examples.zh: 飓风把他们的摩托艇吹到了岩石上

examples.en: When a tornado touches the ground, it does a lot of damage
examples.zh: 当龙卷风接触地面时，会造成很大的破坏

examples.en: The typhoon is gathering strength
examples.zh: 台风正在增强

examples.en: The valcano erupted and two small towns were buried under meters of hot ash, mud and bits of molten rock
examples.zh: 火山喷发，两个小镇被埋在数米厚的热火山灰、泥土和熔岩之下

entries.translation: 爆发；喷发；（斑疹等）突然出现

examples.en: Hot lava erupted from the crust
examples.zh: 炽热的熔岩从地壳中喷出

examples.en: Some types of minerals are made when magma cools and solidifies
examples.zh: 某些类型的矿物质是在岩浆冷却和凝固时形成的

examples.en: His theory violates current thermodynamic laws
examples.zh: 他的理论违反了当前的热力学定律

examples.en: The smog was so bad that school children were adviced to stay indoors
examples.zh: 雾霾太严重，建议小学生呆在室内

entries.translation: （难闻有害的）烟，气体；发怒，愤怒

examples.en: Petrol fumes from cars are poisoning the atmosphere
examples.zh: 汽车排出的汽油烟雾正在毒害大气

entries.translation: 薄雾；水汽；使视线模糊的东西

examples.en: She could hardly recognize her son from her mist of tears
examples.zh: 她在泪雾中几乎认不出自己的儿子

examples.en: A terrible tsunami followed the earthquake
examples.zh: 地震之后发生了可怕的海啸

examples.en: Many areas in Africa have suffered severe drought this year
examples.zh: 今年非洲多地遭遇严重干旱

examples.en: Since the flooding began last month, seventeen people have died state wide
examples.zh: 自上个月洪水开始以来，全州已有 17 人死亡

examples.en: A torrent of water poured down the mountain
examples.zh: 一股洪流从山上倾泻而下

examples.en: Several countries in Eastern Europe are counting the losses caused by yesterday's earthquake
examples.zh: 东欧多国正在清点昨天地震造成的损失

examples.en: The discovery of seismic activity suggests geological activity could provide large amounts of heat and minerals
examples.zh: 地震活动的发现表明地质活动可以提供大量的热量和矿物质

examples.en: Yesterday's avalanche destroyed several trees
examples.zh: 昨天的雪崩摧毁了几棵树

examples.en: He climbed a tree to view the surrounding terrain
examples.zh: 他爬上一棵树观察周围的地形

entries.translation: 风景；地貌；对...进行景观美化

examples.en: The trees and the mountains made the landscape very beautiful
examples.zh: 树木和山脉使风景非常美丽

examples.en: It is generally thought that Columbus discovered the American continent
examples.zh: 人们普遍认为哥伦布发现了美洲大陆

examples.en: The cave was used by smugglers in the 18th century
examples.zh: 该洞穴在 18 世纪被走私者利用

examples.en: The narrow path leads to a wooden hut on the cliff
examples.zh: 狭窄的小路通向悬崖上的木屋

examples.en: The glacier dislocated the great stones
examples.zh: 冰川使巨石移位

examples.en: In the swamp we were beset by mosquitoes
examples.zh: 在沼泽里我们被蚊子围攻

examples.en: The Nile Delta used to be a fertile land
examples.zh: 尼罗河三角洲曾经是一片肥沃的土地

examples.en: Once there were seventy million buffalo roaming in the great plains
examples.zh: 曾经有七千万头水牛在大平原上漫步

examples.en: The atmosphere is thin on the plateau
examples.zh: 高原上大气稀薄

examples.en: Oasis symbolizes a hope in desert areas
examples.zh: 绿洲象征沙漠地区的希望

examples.en: There are people in almost every habitable part of this globe
examples.zh: 地球上几乎每个可居住的地方都有人

examples.en: In the northern hemisphere, you can hardly see the Magellanic Clouds
examples.zh: 在北半球，你很难看到麦哲伦星云

examples.en: The equator is an imaginary line around the middle of the earth
examples.zh: 赤道是围绕地球中部的一条假想线

entries.translation: 北极的；极冷的；北极地区；北极

examples.en: The polar bears' habitat is the icy waters of the Arctic
examples.zh: 北极熊的栖息地是北极冰冷的水域

entries.translation: 南极的；南极地区；南极洲

examples.en: Because of the extreme cold, the environment in the Antarctic is uniquely fragile
examples.zh: 由于极度寒冷，南极的环境异常脆弱

examples.en: English is spoken from pole to pole
examples.zh: 从一极到另一极都说英语

entries.translation: 极地的；近极地的；对立的

examples.en: In these polar regions, the balance of nature has already been disrupted
examples.zh: 在这些极地地区，自然平衡已经被破坏

examples.en: The earth's axis is the line between the North and the South Poles
examples.zh: 地球的轴是北极和南极之间的线

examples.en: Relations between the two countries have deteriorated sharply in recent weeks
examples.zh: 两国关系近几周急剧恶化

examples.en: Grief aggravated her illness
examples.zh: 悲伤加剧了她的病情

entries.translation: 降解；降低...身份；使恶化；使退化

examples.en: A dishonest action like that will degrade you
examples.zh: 像这样的不诚实行为会贬低你

examples.en: The anti-virus software should often be upgraded
examples.zh: 防病毒软件要经常升级

examples.en: The waves erode the rocks on the shore
examples.zh: 海浪侵蚀着岸边的岩石

entries.translation: 地中海的；地中海地区的；地中海；地中海地区

examples.en: This dish is a cross between Asian and Mediterranean food
examples.zh: 这道菜是亚洲和地中海美食的混合体

examples.en: The Atlantic coast is within sight of the hotel
examples.zh: 从酒店可以看到大西洋海岸

entries.translation: 平静的；平和的；太平洋的；太平洋

examples.en: What a beautiful and pacific place this is
examples.zh: 这是一个多么美丽和平的地方

examples.en: These creatures live in the depth of the Pacific Ocean
examples.zh: 这些生物生活在太平洋深处

entries.translation: 海洋的；海生的；海事的/水兵

examples.en: It is true that a lot of people like marine plants as their food
examples.zh: 确实很多人喜欢海洋植物作为食物

examples.en: Navigation is a game for brave people
examples.zh: 导航是勇敢者的游戏

examples.en: The gulf extends northward
examples.zh: 海湾向北延伸

examples.en: They walked along the beach, talking and laughing
examples.zh: 他们沿着海滩散步，有说有笑

examples.en: He is going to live by the coast for the sake of his health
examples.zh: 为了健康他打算住在海边

examples.en: His ship pulled in to the shore at midnight
examples.zh: 他的船在午夜靠岸

examples.en: The gravitational attraction between the moon and the earth causes tides
examples.zh: 月球和地球之间的引力引起潮汐

examples.en: He was swept away by the current
examples.zh: 他被水流冲走了

examples.en: Before we drink at a brook, it is good to know its source
examples.zh: 在我们喝小溪之前，最好先了解它的来源

examples.en: On either bank of the stream stand rows of willow trees
examples.zh: 溪水两岸矗立着一排排柳树

examples.en: I have heard from reliable sources that the company is in trouble
examples.zh: 我从可靠消息来源听说该公司遇到了麻烦

examples.en: The sea is shallow here
examples.zh: 这里的海很浅

examples.en: Superficial scratches can be easily removed
examples.zh: 表面划痕可以轻松去除

examples.en: In flat open country, there is plenty of grass for the cattle to feed on
examples.zh: 地势平坦开阔，有充足的草可供牛群吃草

examples.en: The process of negotiation was not entirely smooth
examples.zh: 谈判过程并不完全顺利

examples.en: You'd better give us a rough idea of your price
examples.zh: 你最好给我们大概的价格

examples.en: We walked across the fields on the sandy path
examples.zh: 我们沿着沙路穿过田野

examples.en: The ground in this part of the country is poor and stony
examples.zh: 这个国家这个地区的土地贫瘠且多石

examples.en: In some places, the cliff is almost vertical and too dangerous to climb
examples.zh: 有些地方的悬崖几乎是垂直的，攀爬太危险

examples.en: A long steep path leads to a tea house with a grand view of the sea
examples.zh: 一条又长又陡的小路通向一个可以看到大海的茶馆

definitions.definition: 相似之处/平行的/与...相似

entries.translation: 平行线；相似之处/平行的/与...相似；比得上

examples.en: There are few parallels between American football and European football
examples.zh: 美式足球和欧洲足球之间没有什么相似之处

examples.en: The only access to the garden is by a narrow path at the side of the house
examples.zh: 通往花园的唯一通道是房子一侧的一条狭窄小路

examples.en: Oceania is a separate landmass, but it is separated from Asia by very shallow water
examples.zh: 大洋洲是一块独立的陆地，但它与亚洲之间隔着很浅的水

examples.en: Hawaii and Alaska are not on the mainland of the United States
examples.zh: 夏威夷和阿拉斯加不在美国本土

examples.en: His house is located on the tip of the peninsula
examples.zh: 他的房子位于半岛的顶端

examples.en: The current political climate in that country is favorable for foreign investment
examples.zh: 该国当前的政治气候有利于外国投资

examples.en: In warm weather, you should wear clothing that is cool and comfortable
examples.zh: 在温暖的天气里，你应该穿凉爽舒适的衣服

examples.en: Nowadays few people like to study meteorology
examples.zh: 现在很少有人喜欢学气象学

examples.en: The weather is mild today. It is neither hot nor cold
examples.zh: 今天天气温和。天气不热也不冷

examples.en: The workers are installing a heating system
examples.zh: 工人们正在安装供暖系统

entries.translation: 适度的；温和的；中等的/使缓和

examples.en: The wind was strong all day, but it moderated in the evening
examples.zh: 一整天风都很大，但到了晚上就减弱了

examples.en: The blood of a warm-blooded animal remains around the same temperature both on warm and cold days
examples.zh: 温血动物的血液在温暖和寒冷的日子里都保持在相同的温度

examples.en: The thermal energy has become more and more important
examples.zh: 热能变得越来越重要

examples.en: He lives in the tropics
examples.zh: 他住在热带地区

examples.en: It is difficult to grow food in arid dessert areas
examples.zh: 在干旱的沙漠地区种植粮食很困难

examples.en: His eyes were moist with tears
examples.zh: 他的眼睛湿润了泪水

examples.en: The damp match won't strike
examples.zh: 潮湿的火柴打不着

examples.en: The milk powder has lumped together because my home is so humid
examples.zh: 因为家里太潮湿，奶粉都结块了

examples.en: The snowy weather lasted the whole time we were there
examples.zh: 我们在那里的时候一直都是下雪的天气

examples.en: Sweet potatoes decayed after the frost
examples.zh: 霜后红薯腐烂了

examples.en: It hailed during the night
examples.zh: 夜间下了冰雹

entries.translation: 解冻；融解；融化/解冻时期

examples.en: The sun thawed the ice and melted the snow
examples.zh: 太阳融化了冰雪

entries.translation: 使变冷；使恐惧/寒冷；害怕

examples.en: The bad news cast a chill over the whole family
examples.zh: 这个坏消息让全家人都感到一阵寒意

examples.en: The weatherman predicted a freeze for tonight
examples.zh: 天气预报员预测今晚将结冰

examples.en: Hohhot(呼和浩特) is a frigid city in winter
examples.zh: 呼和浩特是一座冬季寒冷的城市

examples.en: There was a tremble in her voice
examples.zh: 她的声音有些颤抖

examples.en: She shivered because she was worried and afraid
examples.zh: 她因为担心和害怕而颤抖

entries.translation: 雷；雷声/打雷；轰隆隆的快速移动

examples.en: An express train thundered through the station
examples.zh: 一列特快列车呼啸而过车站

examples.en: During the storm, flashes of lightning appeared in the sky
examples.zh: 暴风雨期间，天空中出现闪电

entries.translation: 有暴风雨的；争吵激烈的；（大海）波涛汹涌的

examples.en: Our ship was tossed about on the stormy sea
examples.zh: 我们的船在惊涛骇浪中颠簸

examples.en: For the past six hours, the downpour had been continuous
examples.zh: 过去六个小时，倾盆大雨一直持续

examples.en: There have been four years of below-average rainfall
examples.zh: 降雨量已连续四年低于平均水平

examples.en: We've only had a few sprinkles of rain recently
examples.zh: 最近我们只下过几场小雨

examples.en: A rainbow is usually seen after a heavy rain
examples.zh: 大雨之后通常会看到彩虹

examples.en: The weatherman predicts showers this afternoon
examples.zh: 天气预报员预计今天下午有阵雨

examples.en: The maximum temperature in July may be 36 degrees Celsius
examples.zh: 7月最高气温可能达36摄氏度

examples.en: After the storm, there will be a sharp drop in temperature
examples.zh: 暴风雨过后，气温将急剧下降

examples.en: The recent statement of the president forecasts a change in the situation
examples.zh: 总统最近的声明预测情况会发生变化

examples.en: The mountain peaks are covered with snow all year around
examples.zh: 山峰终年积雪

examples.en: The old lady can only mount the stairs with difficulty
examples.zh: 老太太只能艰难地爬楼梯

examples.en: The northern side of the mountain is almost vertical
examples.zh: 山的北侧几乎是垂直的

examples.en: A range of hills rose on our left
examples.zh: 一系列的山丘在我们的左边升起

examples.en: The sky above the ridges of the mountains brightened
examples.zh: 山脊上方的天空变亮了

examples.en: He ran up the slope to the top of the hill
examples.zh: 他跑上斜坡，跑到山顶

examples.en: The valley was hidden from view in the mist
examples.zh: 山谷隐藏在薄雾中

examples.en: The path steepened as they climed the hillside
examples.zh: 他们爬上山坡时，路变得越来越陡

examples.en: The house on the hill overlooks the village
examples.zh: 山上的房子俯瞰村庄

examples.en: Only in the southern part of Taiwan have I seen such scenery
examples.zh: 只有在台湾南部才见过这样的风景

definitions.definition: Austria lies to the southeast of Germany

entries.translation: Austria lies to the southeast of Germany

examples.en: I know we have to go southeast, more or less.
examples.zh: 我知道我们大概得往东南方向走。

examples.en: The southeast is the most densely populated area.
examples.zh: 东南部是最稠密的居住区。

definitions.definition: Ireland is in the southwest of the British Isles

entries.translation: Ireland is in the southwest of the British Isles

examples.en: Then the southwest wind began to blow.
examples.zh: 接着西南风开始刮起来了。

examples.en: It's some 65 miles southwest of Houston.
examples.zh: 它位于休斯敦西南方约六十五英里。

definitions.definition: Snow in October is nothing strange in northeast China

entries.translation: Snow in October is nothing strange in northeast China

examples.en: The northeast has been particularly hard hit..
examples.zh: 东北部受影响尤其严重。

examples.en: This rural outpost, 400 miles northeast of Helena, has one stoplight.
examples.zh: 这个在赫勒拿东北400英里处的农村居民点有一个交通信号灯。

definitions.definition: There is a large hilly area in the northwest

entries.translation: There is a large hilly area in the northwest

examples.en: The northwest became the country's breadbasket.
examples.zh: 西北地区成为了该国的粮仓。

examples.en: Just a couple of hours to the northwest of the capital is the wine-growing area of Hunter Valley.
examples.zh: 在首都的西北仅两三个小时的路程就是猎人谷的葡萄酒酿造区。

examples.en: The eastern situation is similarly intense
examples.zh: 东部局势同样严峻

examples.en: She has studied the cultures of oriental countries
examples.zh: 她研究过东方国家的文化

examples.en: Such a difficult operation may not succeed, but it's an inevitable gamble
examples.zh: 如此艰难的手术或许不会成功，但却是一场不可避免的赌博

entries.translation: 不可逆转的；不可挽回的

examples.en: He suffered irreversible brain damage in the incident
examples.zh: 他在事件中遭受了不可逆转的脑损伤

examples.en: The patient is breathing irregularly
examples.zh: 病人呼吸不规则

examples.en: our bright red coat would be quite inappropriate for a funeral
examples.zh: 我们的鲜红色外套不太适合参加葬礼

entries.translation: 不正常的；反常的；变态的

examples.en: El Nino will result in the abnormal weather
examples.zh: 厄尔尼诺现象将导致异常天气

examples.en: The sediment of coffee will settle
examples.zh: 咖啡的沉淀物会沉淀下来

examples.en: River sediments gradually silted up the harbor
examples.zh: 河流泥沙逐渐淤塞港口

examples.en: We left the car and struck out along the muddy track
examples.zh: 我们下了车，沿着泥泞的小路出发

examples.en: Bricks and dishes are made from various kinds of clay
examples.zh: 砖块和盘子是由各种粘土制成的

examples.en: The children were outside, playing happily in the dirt
examples.zh: 孩子们在外面的泥土里快乐地玩耍

examples.en: The disease occurs most frequently in rural areas
examples.zh: 该病多发于农村地区

examples.en: They proposed setting up a school in the suburbs
examples.zh: 他们提议在郊区设立一所学校

examples.en: We live on the outskirts of the city

examples.en: The whole country was in a state of ferment
examples.zh: 整个国家都处于发酵状态

entries.translation: 冲淡；稀释。稀释了的；减弱了的

examples.en: The nurse diluted the drug with saline water
examples.zh: 护士用盐水稀释药物

examples.en: When she spoke, her tone was like acid
examples.zh: 她说话的时候语气就像是尖酸刻薄

examples.en: Increasing tax on petrol would encourage people to drive cars with fewer noxious emissions
examples.zh: 增加汽油税将鼓励人们驾驶有毒排放较少的汽车

examples.en: This cloth material has static electricity
examples.zh: 这种布料材质有静电

entries.translation: 无生气的；惰性的；不活泼

examples.en: Helium and neon are inert gases
examples.zh: 氦气和氖气是惰性气体

examples.en: Polarity is inherent in a magent
examples.zh: 极性是磁体固有的

entries.translation: 公式；方程式；原则；配方；分子式

examples.en: The formula for water is H2O
examples.zh: 水的分子式是H2O

examples.en: Regular exercise is one of the key components of a healthy lifestyle
examples.zh: 定期锻炼是健康生活方式的关键组成部分之一

examples.en: Water is composed of hydrogen and oxygen
examples.zh: 水是由氢和氧组成的

examples.en: her new play is mixture of sadness and humour
examples.zh: 她的新剧混合了悲伤和幽默

examples.en: His manner was a blend of friendliness and respect
examples.zh: 他的举止既友善又尊重

examples.en: There are many theories about the origin of the universe
examples.zh: 关于宇宙的起源有很多理论

entries.translation: 经验主义的；以实验为依据的

examples.en: His thesis is not very convincing for lack of empirical evidence
examples.zh: 由于缺乏经验证据，他的论文不太有说服力

entries.translation: 实际的；有用的；务实的；心灵手巧的

examples.en: He is very practical. He can make or mend almost anything
examples.zh: 他很实际。他几乎可以制造或修理任何东西

examples.en: The doctrine is unchangable
examples.zh: 教义是不变的

examples.en: A bicycle and a motorcycle are built on the same principle
examples.zh: 自行车和摩托车的制造原理相同

examples.en: It takes years of discipline to become a ballerina
examples.zh: 成为一名芭蕾舞演员需要多年的训练

examples.en: The protocol would have many positive results in the long term
examples.zh: 从长远来看，该协议将产生许多积极成果

examples.en: There are two semesters in a year
examples.zh: 一年有两个学期

examples.en: There are eight English classes listed on this term's timetable
examples.zh: 本学期的时间表列出了八门英语课程

examples.en: The next thing on my schedule is to buy some milk in the supermarket
examples.zh: 我日程中的下一件事是去超市买一些牛奶

examples.en: I hope we can finish this before the deadline
examples.zh: 我希望我们能在截止日期前完成这件事

examples.en: She is currently doing a business studies course at Leeds
examples.zh: 她目前正在利兹学习商业研究课程

examples.en: The lesson from your failure is perhaps a broader one
examples.zh: 你的失败的教训也许是更广泛的教训

examples.en: The staff should work together to revise the school curriculum
examples.zh: 教职员应共同努力修订学校课程

examples.en: Why didn't you come to yesterday's seminar?
examples.zh: 你为什么没来参加昨天的研讨会？

entries.translation: 论坛；讨论会；公开讨论广场

examples.en: The forum is now open to all small and medium-sized enterprises
examples.zh: 论坛现已向所有中小企业开放

examples.en: The syllabus changes every year
examples.zh: 课程大纲每年都会变化

examples.en: The new system is still in the planning stage
examples.zh: 新系统仍处于规划阶段

examples.en: He only has a rudimentary knowledge of the dinosaurs
examples.zh: 他对恐龙只有粗浅的了解

examples.en: The government increased prices on some basic commodities like meat and dairy products
examples.zh: 政府提高了肉类和乳制品等一些基本商品的价格

examples.en: Another fundamental consideration in the conception of a design is function
examples.zh: 设计概念中的另一个基本考虑因素是功能

examples.en: Their course of study includes elementary hygiene and medical theories
examples.zh: 他们的学习课程包括基础卫生学和医学理论

entries.translation: （影响）深刻的，深远的；见解深刻的

examples.en: His brother's words have had a profound effect on him
examples.zh: 他哥哥的话对他产生了深远的影响

examples.en: The surface of the bamboo feels so smooth
examples.zh: 竹子的表面摸起来很光滑

examples.en: Britain did not introduce compulsory primary education until 1880
examples.zh: 英国直到1880年才实行初等义务教育

examples.en: Training is a prerequisite for competence
examples.zh: 培训是能力的先决条件

examples.en: The man seem to have a very selective recall of past events
examples.zh: 这个人似乎对过去的事件有非常选择性的回忆

examples.en: Besides the required courses, I'm taking an elective in computer science
examples.zh: 除了必修课程外，我还选修计算机科学

examples.en: A brave fighter never shrinks from danger when executing an assignment
examples.zh: 勇敢的战士执行任务时从不畏惧危险

examples.en: I hope you can submit your term papers before the deadline
examples.zh: 我希望你能在截止日期前提交你的学期论文

examples.en: Please do the preview and review work
examples.zh: 请做好预习和审核工作

examples.en: We must hold a careful review of historical events
examples.zh: 我们必须认真回顾历史事件

examples.en: The writer was revising what he had written
examples.zh: 作者正在修改他所写的内容

examples.en: The mayor will inspect our school tomorrow
examples.zh: 明天市长将视察我们学校

examples.en: In this case, I recommended that you consult your doctor
examples.zh: 在这种情况下，我建议你咨询你的医生

examples.en: It's important for you to skim through this article
examples.zh: 浏览这篇文章对您来说很重要

examples.en: I just had a quick scan through your book again
examples.zh: 我刚刚又快速浏览了一遍你的书

examples.en: The jeweler scrutinized the ruby for flaws
examples.zh: 珠宝商仔细检查红宝石是否有瑕疵

examples.en: Each child had to recite a poem in class
examples.zh: 每个孩子必须在课堂上背诵一首诗

entries.translation: 让（某人）听写；命令；强行规定

examples.en: The English teacher dictates to the class every other week
examples.zh: 英语老师每隔一周向全班听授一次

examples.en: Did you have to get through an entrance examination
examples.zh: 你必须通过入学考试吗

examples.en: The scientist have already experimented at test sites
examples.zh: 科学家已经在试验场进行了实验

examples.en: The quiz was a good opportunity for him to exhibit his knowledge
examples.zh: 这次测验是他展示知识的好机会

examples.en: There is a presentation of our new play tonight
examples.zh: 今晚有我们新剧的演出

examples.en: It is not a viable option to plagiarize someone's work
examples.zh: 抄袭某人的作品不是一个可行的选择

examples.en: This painting is a copy of the one in the museum
examples.zh: 这幅画是博物馆里那幅画的复制品

examples.en: Print these words in Italics across the top of the page
examples.zh: 在页面顶部以斜体打印这些文字

examples.en: To be specific, the argument in your graduation thesis is logical
examples.zh: 具体来说，你的毕业论文中的论点是合乎逻辑的

examples.en: This essay represents a considerable improvement on your recent work
examples.zh: 这篇文章代表了你最近工作的显着进步

examples.en: She is working hard at her term paper in the library
examples.zh: 她正在图书馆努力写学期论文

entries.translation: 专题论文；（尤指）学位论文

examples.en: Each student will have a supervisor to advise on the writing of a dissertation
examples.zh: 每个学生都会有一名导师就论文写作提供建议

entries.translation: （大中学生的）专题研究；项目；方案

examples.en: It is an elaborate project that applies to many purposes
examples.zh: 这是一个适用于多种目的的精心设计的项目

examples.en: The heading was in large print
examples.zh: 标题是大字体

examples.en: The science fiction fascinates the readers from the outset
examples.zh: 科幻小说从一开始就吸引了读者

examples.en: This document provided a broad outline of the country's development after the World War II
examples.zh: 该文件概述了二战后该国的发展概况

examples.en: That is not the point in question
examples.zh: 这不是问题的重点

examples.en: He cannot understand the gist of their argument
examples.zh: 他无法理解他们争论的要点

examples.en: She asked her friends' opinions about her plans
examples.zh: 她询问朋友们对她的计划的看法

examples.en: Britain did not introduce complusory primary education until 1880
examples.zh: 英国直到1880年才引入义务初等教育

examples.en: This book is for reference only
examples.zh: 本书仅供参考

examples.en: I'll just cite some figures for comparison
examples.zh: 我只是举一些数字来进行比较

examples.en: At last, we elicited some important information from him
examples.zh: 最后，我们从他那里得到了一些重要的信息

examples.en: The author frequently quoted Shakespeare
examples.zh: 作者经常引用莎士比亚的话

examples.en: The following extract is taken from his commentary on the movie
examples.zh: 以下摘自他对电影的评论

entries.translation: 摘要。抽象的。提取；把...抽象出

examples.en: Iron is abstracted from ore
examples.zh: 铁是从矿石中提取的

examples.en: The professor asked the students to make a summary of the reading material
examples.zh: 教授要求学生对阅读材料进行总结

entries.translation: 假定；设想；承担（责任）；取得（权力）

examples.en: We were wrong to assume she'd agree.
examples.zh: 我们错误地以为她会同意。

examples.en: We were wrong to assume that she'd agree.
examples.zh: 我们错误地以为她会同意。

examples.en: From his words, I presumed that he had been in France for several years
examples.zh: 从他的话里我推测他已经来法国好几年了

examples.en: Let us suppose another planet with conditions similar to those on the earth
examples.zh: 让我们假设另一个星球的条件与地球相似

examples.en: This is only a scientific hypothesis that has not been proved by experiments
examples.zh: 这只是一个科学假设，尚未被实验证明

examples.en: The experts had postulated that this disease can be cured in a couple of decades
examples.zh: 专家们推测这种病可以在几十年内治愈

examples.en: The doctors could only speculate that he died of cancer
examples.zh: 医生只能推测他死于癌症

examples.en: It is virtually impossible to predict the future accurately
examples.zh: 准确预测未来几乎是不可能的

examples.en: I perceived that it was not possible to make her change her mind
examples.zh: 我意识到不可能让她改变主意

examples.en: The man is responsible for detecting some kind of weak signals
examples.zh: 该男子负责检测某种微弱信号

examples.en: The child find it hard to discern between red and green
examples.zh: 孩子很难辨别红色和绿色

examples.en: I recoginized Peter at once, although I hadn't seen him for many years
examples.zh: 我立刻认出了彼得，尽管我已经很多年没见到他了

examples.en: He was conscious of his guilt
examples.zh: 他意识到自己的罪孽

examples.en: We had reckoned on your support
examples.zh: 我们已经考虑到了您的支持

examples.en: The board deemed it urgent that these files be printed right away
examples.zh: 董事会认为立即打印这些文件是当务之急

examples.en: The way he talked implied that he was not willing to accept the agreement
examples.zh: 他说话的语气暗示着他不愿意接受这个协议

entries.translation: 深思熟虑；仔细考虑。审慎的

examples.en: She deliberated the question before she made an answer
examples.zh: 她在回答之前仔细考虑了这个问题

examples.en: A committee has been elected to represent us
examples.zh: 已选出一个委员会代表我们

entries.translation: 坚持；坚决认为（主张或要求）

examples.en: We insist on self-reliance
examples.zh: 我们坚持自力更生

examples.en: On the top the massive mountains, snow persists throughout the year
examples.zh: 崇山峻岭之上，终年积雪

examples.en: What human beings have understood is just the tip of the iceberg
examples.zh: 人类所了解的只是冰山一角

examples.en: You can say you have comprehended a word if you can use it correctly and effectively
examples.zh: 如果你能正确有效地使用一个单词，你就可以说你已经理解了它

examples.en: We should analyze the cause and the effect of this event
examples.zh: 我们应该分析一下这个事件的原因和影响

examples.en: We can use a test to diagnose a variety of diseases
examples.zh: 我们可以使用测试来诊断多种疾病

examples.en: From your smile, I infer that you like this drink
examples.zh: 从你的笑容，我推断你喜欢这种饮料

examples.en: We can deduce a conclusion from this premise
examples.zh: 从这个前提我们可以推出一个结论

entries.translation: 推断出；得出结论；（使）结束

examples.en: What do you conclude from his explanation?
examples.zh: 从他的解释中你得出什么结论？

examples.en: The man drew an analogy between the human skin and a brick wall
examples.zh: 该男子将人的皮肤与砖墙进行了类比

examples.en: Your knowledge cannot yet compare with his
examples.zh: 你的知识还不能和他相比

examples.en: There is a great contrast between good and evil
examples.zh: 善恶反差很大

examples.en: The plots and descriptions in these two novels largely overlap
examples.zh: 这两部小说的情节和描述有很大的重叠

examples.en: Your attitude is in contradiction to your character
examples.zh: 你的态度与你的性格相矛盾

examples.en: I strongly disagree with this immoral approach to science
examples.zh: 我强烈反对这种不道德的科学方法

examples.en: The two theories differ from each other in many ways
examples.zh: 这两种理论在很多方面都有所不同

examples.en: The original meaning of this word has become more diverse over time
examples.zh: 随着时间的推移，这个词的原始含义变得更加多样化

examples.en: The investigator watched the suspect's face intently to catch every nuance of expression
examples.zh: 调查员专注地观察嫌疑人的脸，捕捉每一个表情的细微差别

examples.en: You need to infer by inductive reasoning
examples.zh: 你需要通过归纳推理来推断

examples.en: No detail was too small to escape the detective's attention
examples.zh: 任何细节都逃不过侦探的注意

examples.en: A thorough brushing helps to protect your teeth and gums
examples.zh: 彻底刷牙有助于保护牙齿和牙龈

examples.en: Her diligence has set an example to the others
examples.zh: 她的勤奋为其他人树立了榜样

examples.en: Nowadays we can read many instances of good people and good deeds in the press
examples.zh: 如今，我们在报刊上可以读到许多好人好事的事例。

examples.en: Her new film confirmed her as one of our leading directors
examples.zh: 她的新电影证实了她是我们的主要导演之一

examples.en: He demonstrated how to use the new machine
examples.zh: 他演示了如何使用新机器

entries.translation: （用图等）说明；给（书）加插图（或图表）

examples.en: The book was illustrated with color photographs
examples.zh: 这本书配有彩色照片插图

examples.en: Her bravery manifests itself in times of difficulty
examples.zh: 她的勇敢在困难时期表现得淋漓尽致

examples.en: He has proved his loyalty in the battle
examples.zh: 他在战斗中证明了自己的忠诚

examples.en: He determined to move to another city and start a new life
examples.zh: 他决定搬到另一个城市开始新的生活

examples.en: Don't decide on important matters too quickly
examples.zh: 不要太快地决定重要的事情

entries.translation: 决心；决定；（使）分解为；解决

examples.en: She resolves that she will never eat junk food
examples.zh: 她决心永远不吃垃圾食品

entries.translation: 民意调查；对...进行民意调查

examples.en: A recent survey of public opinions shows that many people are worried about the rising house prices
examples.zh: 近期的一项民意调查显示，不少人对房价上涨感到担忧

examples.en: It is a good idea to do some research before you buy a house
examples.zh: 在买房子之前做一些研究是个好主意

examples.en: I observed a stranger enter my neighbor's home
examples.zh: 我观察到一个陌生人进入我邻居家

examples.en: We must inquire into the matter
examples.zh: 我们必须调查此事

examples.en: I have serveral queries about the work you give me
examples.zh: 我对你给我的工作有一些疑问

examples.en: We have sent out nealy 3000 questionnaires, but only a third of them were returned
examples.zh: 我们已发出近3000份问卷，但只回收了三分之一

examples.en: In many fields, women have yet to achieve the equal participation in policy making processes
examples.zh: 在许多领域，妇女尚未实现平等参与决策过程

examples.en: Though the task was challenging, we managed to accomplish it on time
examples.zh: 尽管任务具有挑战性，但我们还是按时完成了

examples.en: Great efforts are needed before we can attain our goal
examples.zh: 我们需要付出巨大的努力才能达到我们的目标

examples.en: I need three more credits to graduate
examples.zh: 我还需要三个学分才能毕业

examples.en: Now the score in the football game is one one
examples.zh: 现在足球比赛的比分是一比一

entries.translation: 分数；标记；标志着；给...打分；在...上做记号

examples.en: It is dangerous to swim beyond this mark
examples.zh: 游过这个标记是危险的

entries.translation: 给...分等级：等级；成绩等级

examples.en: This grade of jade can be bought at a fairly low price
examples.zh: 这个等级的玉石可以用相当低的价格买到

examples.en: There are people of all ranks and classes
examples.zh: 各个阶层、各个阶层的人都有

examples.en: A row of children are standing in front of a row of chairs1
examples.zh: 一排孩子站在一排椅子前1

examples.en: We should join the queue inside the bank
examples.zh: 我们应该加入银行内的队列

examples.en: I grant that book gives us something insights into human nature, but generally speaking, it is boring
examples.zh: 我承认这本书让我们对人性有所了解，但总的来说，它很无聊

examples.en: American reviewers are lavish in their praise of this movie
examples.zh: 美国影评人对这部电影赞不绝口

examples.en: We appreciate your efforts for the development of the company
examples.zh: 我们感谢您为公司发展所做的努力

examples.en: We'd appreciate it if you gave us some feedback on our new product
examples.zh: 如果您对我们的新产品提供一些反馈，我们将不胜感激

examples.en: Don't underestimate the difficulty of this job
examples.zh: 不要低估这项工作的难度

examples.en: Most customers overestimated the price of the overcoat
examples.zh: 大多数顾客高估了大衣的价格

examples.en: My cousin applied to four universities and was accepted by all of them
examples.zh: 我表弟申请了四所大学并且全部被录取

examples.en: As a student, he was awarded the fellowship at Harvard
examples.zh: 作为一名学生，他获得了哈佛大学的奖学金

examples.en: For a few, scholarships were their main source of support
examples.zh: 对于一些人来说，奖学金是他们的主要支持来源

examples.en: Virture is its own reward
examples.zh: 美德是它自己的回报

examples.en: The novice writer is especially thrilled with this award
examples.zh: 新手作家对这个奖项感到特别兴奋

examples.en: We prize honor above money
examples.zh: 我们看重荣誉胜过金钱

examples.en: A higher fee doesn't necessarily mean a better course
examples.zh: 更高的费用并不一定意味着更好的课程

examples.en: Life is made so much easier with modern science and technology
examples.zh: 现代科学技术让生活变得更加轻松

examples.en: I want to learn the latest technique in toy making
examples.zh: 我想学习最新的玩具制作技术

entries.translation: 有关多种工艺的；理工学院

examples.en: You trainees will acquire polytechnic training
examples.zh: 您的学员将接受理工学院培训

examples.en: Each engineer needs to be in touch with the entire engineering department
examples.zh: 每个工程师都需要与整个工程部门保持联系

examples.en: This car has broken down again. I have to ring the mechanic
examples.zh: 这辆车又坏了。我得给机械师打电话

examples.en: We have advanced greatly in our knowledge of the universe
examples.zh: 我们对宇宙的认识有了很大的进步

examples.en: We must innovate in order to make progress
examples.zh: 我们必须创新才能进步

examples.en: Surgeons have made a great breakthrough in kidney transplantation
examples.zh: 外科医生在肾移植方面取得重大突破

examples.en: The modern world is increasingly populated by intelligent gizmos, whose universal existence has removed much human labor
examples.zh: 现代世界中智能设备的数量越来越多，它们的普遍存在已经消除了许多人类劳动

entries.translation: 专利；专利权；得到...的专利权；给...专利证

examples.en: The government patented this device to its inventor
examples.zh: 政府向其发明者授予了该设备的专利

examples.en: The team is trying to devise a new system for handling mail order
examples.zh: 该团队正在尝试设计一种处理邮购的新系统

examples.en: Do you who invented the magnetic needle?
examples.zh: 你是磁针的发明者吗？

examples.en: He discovered his talent for fashion design when he was very young
examples.zh: 他很小的时候就发现了自己的时装设计天赋

examples.en: The authority finally disclosed the truth to the press
examples.zh: 当局终于向媒体披露了真相

examples.en: His deed revealed him to be a kind man
examples.zh: 他的行为表明他是一个善良的人

examples.en: The detective must uncover the murder by deduction of facts
examples.zh: 侦探必须通过推理事实揭露谋杀案

examples.en: The crime of the corrupt officials must be exposed without any reserve
examples.zh: 腐败官员的罪行必须毫无保留地揭露

entries.translation: （活动、学问等的）领域；领土；领地

examples.en: This is out of my domain
examples.zh: 这不属于我的领域

examples.en: Such an idea only belongs in the realm of science fiction
examples.zh: 这样的想法只属于科幻小说的范畴

examples.en: He laid the foundations his success by hard work
examples.zh: 他通过努力工作奠定了成功的基础

examples.en: Many students specialize in engineering
examples.zh: 许多学生专注于工程

examples.en: They will concentrate on teaching the basics of reading, writing, and arithmetic
examples.zh: 他们将专注于教授阅读、写作和算术的基础知识

examples.en: Today he was able to focus his message exclusively on the economy
examples.zh: 今天，他能够将讲话的重点完全集中在经济上

examples.en: In order to utilize land more fully, they adopted close planting
examples.zh: 为了更充分地利用土地，他们采取了密植

examples.en: The college board said what's on the new test will relate to usage
examples.zh: 大学董事会表示，新测试的内容将与使用情况相关

examples.en: The battery tester is in my garage
examples.zh: 电池测试仪在我的车库里

examples.en: These newly designed devices will appear in the exhibition next month
examples.zh: 这些新设计的设备将出现在下个月的展会上

examples.en: The household appliances were just bought by him for his family
examples.zh: 家电是他刚给家人买的

examples.en: This facility is open to both new and existing borrowers
examples.zh: 该设施向新借款人和现有借款人开放

examples.en: We should make better use of the existing equipment
examples.zh: 我们应该更好地利用现有的设备

examples.en: A plow is an instrument used for farming
examples.zh: 犁是一种用于耕作的工具

examples.en: Advertising is a tool that nearly every company is utilizing
examples.zh: 广告是几乎每个公司都在使用的工具

examples.en: It was difficult to gauge how people would respond
examples.zh: 很难判断人们会如何反应

examples.en: Measure this impedance, and you can measure how much it has rained
examples.zh: 测量这个阻抗，你就可以测量下雨的程度

examples.en: Our price has already been closely calculated. There is no room for reduction
examples.zh: 我们的价格已经经过仔细计算。没有减少的空间

examples.en: I compute my loss at 500 dollars
examples.zh: 我计算损失为 500 美元

examples.en: It is impossible to count the stars in the sky
examples.zh: 天上的星星是无法数清的

examples.en: Now I've realized that my estimate of her character was one-sided
examples.zh: 现在我发现我对她性格的评价是片面的

examples.en: We will assess the damage caused by the flood
examples.zh: 我们将评估洪水造成的损失

examples.en: The research project has only been underway for three months, so it is too early to evaluate its success
examples.zh: 该研究项目仅进行了三个月，因此评估其成功还为时过早

examples.en: Car accessories include the roof rack and radio
examples.zh: 汽车配件包括车顶行李架和收音机

examples.en: Happiness is not a goal. It is a byproduct
examples.zh: 幸福不是一个目标。它是一个副产品

examples.en: When there is a power shortage, they count on the auxiliary power supply
examples.zh: 当电力短缺时，他们依靠辅助电源

examples.en: Plastic is a versatile material in industry
examples.zh: 塑料是工业上的通用材料

examples.en: He didn't add milk nor sugar to his coffee
examples.zh: 他没有在咖啡里加牛奶或糖

examples.en: Dust and dirt soon accumulate if you don't clean your house regularly
examples.zh: 如果你不定期打扫房子，灰尘和污垢很快就会积聚

examples.en: A large crowd had assembled outside the American Embassy
examples.zh: 美国大使馆外聚集了一大群人

examples.en: He took the trouble to gather the materials for me
examples.zh: 他不厌其烦地帮我收集材料

examples.en: China will not attach itself to any big power
examples.zh: 中国不会依附任何大国

entries.translation: 应在（某处）；适合（某种情形）

examples.en: Russia a major oil exportor, but does not belong to OPEC
examples.zh: 俄罗斯是主要石油出口国，但不属于欧佩克

examples.en: Newton published his first work on optics
examples.zh: 牛顿发表了他的第一部光学著作

examples.en: The optical microscope magnifies the object a thousand times
examples.zh: 光学显微镜将物体放大一千倍

examples.en: When viewing through a lens, we can see the thing clearer, larger or smaller
examples.zh: 当通过镜头观看时，我们可以看到物体更清晰、更大或更小

examples.en: Officials want to scan the tomb with radar in the hope of unlocking the mystery
examples.zh: 官员希望用雷达扫描坟墓，希望解开谜团

examples.en: The cathedral is echoing with joynous hymns
examples.zh: 大教堂里回荡着欢乐的圣歌

examples.en: Place the sensor on a flat surface and rotate it slowly through 360 degress
examples.zh: 将传感器放在平坦的表面上并缓慢旋转 360 度

examples.en: As part of the celebrations, they staged a big open-air multimedia event
examples.zh: 作为庆祝活动的一部分，他们举办了一场大型露天多媒体活动

examples.en: President Bush's speech was broadcast on national television network
examples.zh: 布什总统的讲话在国家电视网络上播出

examples.en: In your web browser's cache are the most recent web files that you have downloaded
examples.zh: 您的网络浏览器的缓存中包含您下载的最新网络文件

examples.en: She picked up the phone and began to dial his number
examples.zh: 她拿起电话，开始拨打他的号码

examples.en: A newly devised microcomputer can act as a guide for a blind person
examples.zh: 新设计的微型计算机可以为盲人提供指导

examples.en: A laptop would be really useful when I'm working on the train
examples.zh: 当我在火车上工作时，笔记本电脑真的很有用

examples.en: This is a computer software shop
examples.zh: 这是一家电脑软件商店

examples.en: The machine is operated through the keyboard
examples.zh: 本机通过键盘进行操作

examples.en: A list of items is repeatedly flashed on the screen
examples.zh: 屏幕上反复闪烁项目列表

examples.en: The loudspeaker announced each airplane as it landed at the airport
examples.zh: 当每架飞机降落在机场时，扩音器都会播报

examples.en: Unfortunately, I didn't have a microphone at the time to record us.
examples.zh: 不幸的是，我当时没有麦克风来记录我们的声音。

examples.en: He inserted a cassette into the machine
examples.zh: 他将一盒磁带插入机器

examples.en: A technician loads a video tape into one of the machines
examples.zh: 技术人员将录像带装入其中一台机器中

examples.en: The machine does binary calculations
examples.zh: 机器进行二进制计算

examples.en: The BCC has just successfully demonstrated a new digital radio transmission system
examples.zh: BCC刚刚成功演示了一种新的数字无线电传输系统

examples.en: We still don't have the wireless network
examples.zh: 我们仍然没有无线网络

examples.en: High-definition pictures can show details very clearly
examples.zh: 高清图片可以非常清晰地展现细节

examples.en: The reproductive quality of audio tapes has improved enormously
examples.zh: 录音带的再现质量已大大提高

examples.en: I've had my eyes tested and the report says my vision is perfect
examples.zh: 我已经检查过眼睛，报告显示我的视力完美

examples.en: He is unable to divorce fantasy from reality
examples.zh: 他无法将幻想与现实分开

examples.en: Science fiction films are very popular with youngsters
examples.zh: 科幻电影很受年轻人欢迎

examples.en: At the farm, there was a old-fashioned pump for drawing water from a well
examples.zh: 农场里有一台老式水泵，用来从井里抽水。

examples.en: A new type of wind generator may offer an answer to that problem
examples.zh: 一种新型风力发电机可能会解决这个问题

examples.en: Education should be geared to children's needs
examples.zh: 教育应适应儿童的需要

examples.en: The mother is often the pivot of family life
examples.zh: 母亲往往是家庭生活的轴心

examples.en: The boat has no fewer than five hydraulic pumps
examples.zh: 船上有不少于五个液压泵

examples.en: The drainage of the city is poor. Some of the pipes are broken
examples.zh: 城市排水不畅。部分水管已破损

examples.en: Discharge of raw sewage into the sea is unsanitary and unsafe
examples.zh: 原污水排海不卫生、不安全

examples.en: Some people think that ventilation is the same thing as air conditioning
examples.zh: 有些人认为通风和空调是一样的

examples.en: Reining in inflation can increase income inequality by compressing wages while allowing asset prices to soar
examples.zh: 控制通货膨胀会压缩工资，同时导致资产价格飙升，从而加剧收入不平等

examples.en: A long story may be condensed into a few sentences
examples.zh: 一个长故事可以浓缩成几句话

examples.en: The purpose of oil refinery is to refine crude petroleum
examples.zh: 炼油厂的目的是提炼原油

examples.en: Try to simplify your explanation for the children
examples.zh: 尝试简化对孩子的解释

examples.en: They opened the windows to purify the air of the room
examples.zh: 他们打开窗户净化房间的空气

entries.translation: 过滤；（光或声音）透过；过滤器

examples.en: Sunlight filtered through the chinks of the shutters
examples.zh: 阳光透过百叶窗的缝隙照射进来

examples.en: You can distill the water from the lake and make it drinkable
examples.zh: 你可以将湖水蒸馏出来供饮用

examples.en: This fever will return from time to time if it follows its usual mode
examples.zh: 如果遵循通常的模式，这种发烧会不时地复发

examples.en: The prototype for future school building was showed in the library
examples.zh: 未来校舍原型在图书馆展出

examples.en: This bridge over the river has a steel framework
examples.zh: 这座河上的桥有钢框架

examples.en: We must consider a problem in its all aspects
examples.zh: 我们必须考虑一个问题的各个方面

examples.en: The first phase of the project has been completed
examples.zh: 一期工程已竣工

examples.en: It's too difficult for him to operate this new sophisticated machine
examples.zh: 他操作这台新的精密机器太困难了

examples.en: Many modern inventions facilitate housework
examples.zh: 许多现代发明方便了家务劳动

examples.en: She transformed the room by painting it
examples.zh: 她通过粉刷房间来改造房间

definitions.definition: （使）转变、改变（信仰、观点等）/皈依者

entries.translation: （使）转变、改变（信仰、观点等）/皈依者

examples.en: The solar cell can convert the energy of sunlight into electric energy
examples.zh: 太阳能电池可以将太阳光的能量转化为电能

examples.en: If it is not a convenient time, we can alter the date
examples.zh: 如果时间不方便，我们可以更改日期

examples.en: The wind shifted to the north
examples.zh: 风向转向北

entries.translation: 转移；转变/（一次轮到的）机会

examples.en: It was your turn last time. It's always your turn to be the boss
examples.zh: 上次轮到你了。永远轮到你当老板

examples.en: There will be more than one person who can adapt to your personality
examples.zh: 能适应你性格的人不止一个

definitions.definition: 改变（行为或观点）以适应

entries.translation: 调节；改变（行为或观点）以适应

examples.en: He soon adjusted to army life
examples.zh: 他很快就适应了部队生活

entries.translation: 精确指明...位置/针尖；极小的事物

examples.en: With this device, we can pinpoint your exact location
examples.zh: 有了这个设备，我们可以精确定位您的位置

examples.en: Hearsay definitely can't be regarded as accurate information
examples.zh: 道听途说绝对不能算是准确信息

entries.translation: 精确的；准确的；一丝不苟的

examples.en: A lawyer needs a precise mind
examples.zh: 律师需要精准的头脑

examples.en: The correct answers can be found at the bottom of page eight
examples.zh: 正确答案可以在第八页底部找到

examples.en: The accident was caused by human error
examples.zh: 这起事故是人为失误造成的

examples.en: I may have made a mistake in that regard
examples.zh: 我在这方面可能犯了一个错误

examples.en: This flaw makes the vase less valuable
examples.zh: 这个缺陷使花瓶的价值降低

examples.en: Instead of complaining about what's wrong, be grateful for what's right
examples.zh: 与其抱怨什么是错的，不如感激什么是对的

examples.en: It is hard to fault the way he runs his own operation
examples.zh: 他经营自己的业务的方式无可挑剔

entries.translation: 犯错误；绊脚；跌跌撞撞的走

examples.en: The sudden weakness in her legs made her stumble
examples.zh: 双腿突然发软，让她踉踉跄跄

entries.translation: 意外事件；可能发生的事

examples.en: We must always be prepared for every contingency
examples.zh: 我们必须时刻做好应对各种突发事件的准备

examples.en: Circumtances are the ruler of the weak, the instrument of the wise
examples.zh: 环境是弱者的统治者，智者的工具

examples.en: China plays an important role in promoting Asian culture
examples.zh: 中国在弘扬亚洲文化方面发挥着重要作用

examples.en: Western civilization was cradled in Ancient Greece 古希腊滋养了西方文明
examples.zh: 西方文明孕育于古希腊

definitions.definition: the Renaissance 文艺复兴时期

entries.translation: the Renaissance 文艺复兴时期

examples.en: The Renaissance was an epoch of unparalleled cultural achievement 文艺复兴时期是一个在文化上取得空前成就的时代
examples.zh: 文艺复兴时期是一个文化成就无与伦比的时代

examples.en: Their epic fight is the subject of a new film
examples.zh: 他们史诗般的战斗是一部新电影的主题

examples.en: An obsolete ideology can hamper an economy
examples.zh: 过时的意识形态会阻碍经济

examples.en: Asia has a long tradition of tea drinking. China is of no exception
examples.zh: 亚洲有着悠久的饮茶传统。中国也不例外

examples.en: The handshake is a social convention
examples.zh: 握手是一种社交习俗

examples.en: The custom prevails over the whole area 该风俗盛行于这整个地区
examples.zh: 该风俗盛行于整个地区

examples.en: Feudalism was not abolished in England util 1660
examples.zh: 直到 1660 年英国封建制度才被废除

examples.en: They thought slavery was morally wrong
examples.zh: 他们认为奴隶制在道德上是错误的

examples.en: You can't divorce science from ethical questions
examples.zh: 你不能将科学与伦理问题分开

entries.translation: 道德上的；有道德的；morals 道德

examples.en: The old gentleman claimed himself to be a moral man, who had never told a lie in his life
examples.zh: 老先生自称是一个有道德的人，一生中从未说过谎。

examples.en: The tribe's development was more primitive than that of their neighbours/neighbors
examples.zh: 该部落的发展比他们的邻居/邻居更为原始

definitions.definition: Aboriginal 澳大利亚土人/本土原有的

entries.translation: Aboriginal 澳大利亚土人/本土原有的；土著的

examples.en: Many Aboriginals do not like the idea of a day to celebrate the British landing. 许多澳大利亚土著并不喜欢庆祝英国人登陆的日子
examples.zh: 许多原住民不喜欢庆祝英国登陆的日子。 许多澳大利亚球迷并不喜欢庆祝英国人登陆的日子

examples.en: The local inhabitants do not like the noisy tourists in summer
examples.zh: 当地居民不喜欢夏天吵闹的游客

examples.en: He is a native of Beijing
examples.zh: 他是土生土长的北京人

examples.en: He provided local delicacies for his guests.他用当地的美味佳肴来招待客人
examples.zh: 他为客人提供当地美食。他用当地的美味佳肴来招待客人

examples.en: The exotic atmosphere will fascinate you
examples.zh: 异域风情一定会让你着迷

examples.en: Some foreigners assimilate easily into our way of life
examples.zh: 一些外国人很容易融入我们的生活方式

entries.translation: 外侨；外星人；外国的；陌生的

examples.en: I ran into an old friend in the alien land. 他乡遇故知
examples.zh: 我在异乡遇见了一位老朋友。 他乡遇故知

examples.en: The anthropologist contrasted two cultures in his lecture. 这位人类学家在讲座中将两种文化进行对比
examples.zh: 这位人类学家在他的演讲中对比了两种文化。 许多人类学家在讲座中将两种文化进行比较

entries.translation: 人道主义者；人道主义的；博爱的

examples.en: Hepburn is known as a great humanitarian
examples.zh: 赫本被誉为伟大的人道主义者

examples.en: They take great pride in their cultural heritage
examples.zh: 他们对自己的文化遗产感到非常自豪

entries.translation: 继承（财产等）；经遗传获得

examples.en: He inherited a house from his father
examples.zh: 他从父亲那里继承了一套房子

examples.en: He wears designer clothes and drives an antique car
examples.zh: 他穿着名牌服装，开着古董车

examples.en: Archaeology is the study of ancient civilizations
examples.zh: 考古学是对古代文明的研究

examples.en: It took a long time to excavate the ancient city of Troy
examples.zh: 特洛伊古城的发掘花费了很长时间

examples.en: A visit to the museum is an unforgetable experience
examples.zh: 参观博物馆是一次难忘的经历

examples.en: Modern pottery is usually ornamental
examples.zh: 现代陶器通常具有观赏性

examples.en: The jeweler will engrave the inside of the ring with her name
examples.zh: 珠宝商会在戒指内侧刻上她的名字

examples.en: Using extremely different decorating schemes in adjoining rooms may result in lack of unity in style. 相邻的房间用悬殊太大的装修方案会导致风格不统一
examples.zh: 相邻房间采用截然不同的装饰方案可能会导致风格缺乏统一。 相邻的房间用悬而未决的精致装修方案会导致风格不统一

examples.en: There are many religions in the world
examples.zh: 世界上有很多宗教

examples.en: The scientists found that personal involvement in a ritual is necessary
examples.zh: 科学家发现，个人参与仪式是必要的

examples.en: He felt very sorry for his breach of etiquette. 他为他的失礼行为深感抱歉
examples.zh: 他对自己违反礼节的行为感到非常抱歉。 他对自己失礼的行为深感抱歉

examples.en: His firmness in his belief supported him through difficulties
examples.zh: 坚定的信念支撑着他度过了难关

examples.en: No words can express the secret agony of my soul. 没有语言能够表达我心灵的隐痛
examples.zh: 任何言语都无法表达我灵魂深处的隐秘痛苦。 语言无法表达我心灵的隐痛

examples.en: We need a spirit of enterprise if we are to overcome our difficulties. 如果要克服困难，我们就要有进取心
examples.zh: 如果我们要克服困难，就需要进取精神。 如果要克服困难，我们就要有进取心

examples.en: This area was hollowed by sacred memories
examples.zh: 这片区域被神圣的记忆掏空了

examples.en: The Ganges is hallowed as a sacred cleansing river
examples.zh: 恒河被尊为神圣的净化之河

examples.en: A holy person is spiritually pure
examples.zh: 一个圣洁的人在灵性上是纯洁的

examples.en: The election of a new pope is coming
examples.zh: 新教皇选举即将到来

examples.en: I've heard a whisper that the bishop intends to leave. 我听到谣传说主教打算离开
examples.zh: 我听到有人低声说主教打算离开。 我听到谣传主教打算离开

examples.en: The missionary was sent to India last year
examples.zh: 去年传教士被派往印度

examples.en: The priest persuaded him to give up his bad habit
examples.zh: 神父劝他改掉这个坏习惯

examples.en: The Bible begins with the Genesis. 圣经的开篇是创世记
examples.zh: 圣经从创世记开始。 圣经的一篇是创世记

examples.en: I'm just going to the church to see the priest
examples.zh: 我只是去教堂见牧师

examples.en: This cathedral was regarded as a miracle in architectual history
examples.zh: 这座大教堂被视为建筑史上的奇迹

examples.en: The choir sang the Amens beautifully. 唱诗班吟唱的“阿门”非常优美
examples.zh: 唱诗班优美地唱出了阿门颂歌。 唱诗班吟唱的《阿门》非常优美

examples.en: The man was a monk from Mount. MI
examples.zh: 那人是山上的和尚。心肌梗死

examples.en: The temple has been considered an example of classic design
examples.zh: 这座寺庙被认为是经典设计的典范

examples.en: The pagoda perches on the top of the hill. 佛塔立在山顶上
examples.zh: 宝塔坐落在山顶。 佛塔立在山顶

examples.en: The empire had for years been falling into decadence
examples.zh: 帝国多年来一直在走向衰落

examples.en: They made an objection to the imperial system with resolution. 他们坚决反对这种帝国制度
examples.zh: 他们坚决反对帝制。 他们坚决反对这种帝国制度

examples.en: Britain has always had a large navy, called the Royal Navy
examples.zh: 英国一直拥有一支庞大的海军，称为皇家海军

examples.en: The Tang Dynasty is a period remarkable for its liberality
examples.zh: 唐朝是一个以慷慨着称的时期

entries.translation: 年代学；年表；事件发生的顺序表

examples.en: It seems that the paper has confused the chronology of these events
examples.zh: 这篇论文似乎混淆了这些事件的时间顺序

examples.en: The emperor unified the country by the sword
examples.zh: 皇帝以剑统一国家

examples.en: The king is the most important person in a kingdom
examples.zh: 国王是一个王国中最重要的人

examples.en: They were bowing as the king and the queen walked in. 当国王和王后进来时，他们屈膝致敬
examples.zh: 当国王和王后走进时，他们鞠躬。当国王和王后进来时，他们跪下敬礼

examples.en: The princess was ostracised for marrying a rich bourgeois man. 公主因与一位富有的资本家结婚而遭到排挤
examples.zh: 公主因嫁给资产阶级富翁而受到排斥。 公主因与一位富有的资本家联姻而获得排挤

examples.zh: 我享受了皇家仪式的所有威严

examples.zh: 美德是唯一真正的高贵。 万事不如美德高

entries.translation: （英国）贵族；Lord 阁下；大人；the Lord 上帝

examples.en: The yound lord with the red gold hair bowed, "As you command, Lord Edword."
examples.zh: 红金色头发的年轻领主躬身道：“遵命，埃德沃德大人。”

examples.zh: 他因战争服务而被封为爵士

examples.zh: 他成为他兄弟女儿的法定监护人

examples.zh: 名人、金钱和财产往往是青少年的试金石。 名誉、金钱和财产普遍成为青少年简化事物的标准

entries.translation: 地位；身份；尊重程度；仰慕程度；重视程度；（社交媒体上的）状态，近况

examples.en: Being an engineer gives him a high status
examples.zh: 作为一名工程师给了他很高的地位

entries.translation: 背景；（个人出身、受教育）经历

examples.en: He is a man with a special cultural background
examples.zh: 他是一个有着特殊文化背景的人

examples.zh: 这是一次真正难忘的经历

examples.zh: 他在演讲前讲了一个幽默的轶事。

examples.zh: 他的左膝在一次交通事故中受伤了

definitions.definition: （尤指不寻常的、重要的或暴力的）事件

entries.translation: （尤指不寻常的、重要的或暴力的）事件；（两国之间的）冲突

examples.en: A serious incident along the border increased our fears of war
examples.zh: 边境发生的严重事件增加了我们对战争的恐惧

examples.zh: 在门下放一个楔子，使其保持打开状态

examples.zh: 双关语有两种，语音双关语和语义双关语。 双关语分为谐音双关语和语义双关语

examples.zh: 有些问题是用升调说的

examples.zh: 他的每一句话都会被仔细审查他说的每句话都会被仔细审查

examples.zh: 在实际语音中，音素在语音上被实现为某个音素

examples.zh: 每种语言都有不同的元音系统

examples.zh: 这些是单词开头常见的辅音簇/像crack中的cr就是辅音簇

entries.translation: 字母表；（一种语言的）全部字母

examples.en: Q comes between P and R in the English alphabet
examples.zh: Q 在英文字母中位于 P 和 R 之间

entries.translation: 语标，缩记符（如& 、@等） ;非字母语言的字符

examples.zh: ACP是非洲、加勒比和太平洋国家英语的语标

examples.zh: 他的词汇量很足，语法也很棒

examples.zh: 合同中增加了保密条款

examples.zh: 她的感激之情简单而感人

examples.zh: 要从加拿大拨打电话，请在此处给出的号码前使用前缀 01133

examples.zh: “人”这个词是可数名词

examples.zh: 这个年轻人对音乐有着独特的耳朵

examples.zh: 许多国家禁止一夫多妻制

examples.zh: 即将实施的政策是明确且一致的

examples.zh: 企业是一个庞大而复杂的有机体

examples.zh: 随着工具变得越来越复杂，我们需要更复杂的控件来控制它们

entries.translation: 口译；解释；说明；领会；理解

examples.zh: 他将沉默解释为轻蔑

examples.zh: 水手在酒馆里向我讲述他的人生故事

examples.zh: 经理们聚在一起集思广益，找出更永久的问题解决方案

examples.zh: 解说的结论真是一针见血

examples.zh: 新闻界的力量是非常巨大的

examples.zh: 没有记者敢于挑战首相

examples.zh: 如果您有幸在阿尔卑斯山度假，将会有什么乐趣等待着您！

examples.zh: 听音乐是世界各地许多人最喜欢的消遣

examples.zh: 该电视节目旨在教育和娱乐

examples.zh: 她负责娱乐

examples.zh: 哈利编了一些有趣的故事来逗弟弟开心

examples.zh: 谣言很快就传遍了整个公司

examples.en: Could we reach a consensus on this issue? Let's take a vote
examples.zh: 我们能否就这个问题达成共识？我们来投票一下

examples.zh: 这个音乐节将以烟花、现场音乐和烧烤为特色

examples.zh: 宴会由他的母亲和姐妹们主持

examples.zh: 昨天电视上有一档有趣的节目

examples.zh: 该剧目前正在排练中

examples.zh: 爵士乐队将在明天的聚会上现场表演

examples.zh: 他模仿别人到了完美的地步

examples.zh: 他模仿老师的口音

examples.en: We can use computers to simulate many situations
examples.zh: 我们可以用计算机来模拟很多情况

entries.translation: 马戏团；圆形广场（常用于地名）

examples.en: Last Christmas, the circus owner decided to take some presents to a children's hostipal
examples.zh: 去年圣诞节，马戏团老板决定给儿童院送一些礼物

examples.zh: 魔术师用他的魔术让观众兴奋不已

examples.zh: 我哥哥在大学学习戏剧课程

examples.en: Various performers will present a concert to raise money for AIDS charities
examples.zh: 多位表演者将举办一场音乐会，为艾滋病慈善机构筹集资金

examples.zh: 斯德哥尔摩皇家爱乐乐团演奏贝多芬第九交响曲

examples.en: This orchestra has been established under the patronage of the government
examples.zh: 这个乐团是在政府的赞助下成立的

examples.en: I wanted to be a ballet dancer when I was a child
examples.zh: 我小时候想成为一名芭蕾舞演员

examples.zh: 次年她加入皇家歌剧院

examples.zh: 道恩·强森讲述自己主演喜剧的经历

examples.zh: 她太累了，太痛苦了，无法谈论这场悲剧

examples.zh: 正是这部漫画让动画产业起死回生

examples.zh: 这个周末将会有一部好电影上映

examples.zh: 这部电影上映前就被媒体炒作

examples.zh: 当洛根在电影院上映时，它是X级的

examples.zh: 他不是那种可以合作的艺术家

examples.zh: 原创设计由技艺高超的工匠制作

examples.zh: 我在剧中扮演了刻薄阿姨的角色

examples.zh: 当你看到太阳从东方慢慢升起时，场景是完美的

examples.zh: 每个阶段的战斗都完美地进行

examples.zh: 画廊中的图片间隔良好

examples.zh: 他们作为我的客人来参观展览

examples.zh: 他的审美标准和我很不一样

examples.zh: 他以前喜欢收集邮票，但现在喜欢收集硬币

examples.zh: 他们是从众多申请者中脱颖而出的

examples.zh: 我的阿姨选择提前退休

examples.zh: 他的照片显示了植物的生长情况

examples.zh: 她的肖像挂在图书馆的大厅里

examples.zh: 这幅画价值连城

examples.zh: 雕塑的流畅轮廓令人惊叹

examples.zh: 用尺子画一条线

examples.zh: 在这本新传记中，她被描绘成一个孤独而不幸的女人

examples.zh: 如果演员在舞台上忘记台词，他就必须即兴发挥

examples.zh: 鼓是最古老的乐器之一

examples.zh: 他精通多种风格的爵士乐

examples.zh: 华丽摇滚于 20 世纪 70 年代初发展起来，大卫·鲍伊 (David Bowie) 是最有影响力的华丽摇滚艺术家之一

definitions.definition: （尤美-通常是金属或者木质的）桶

entries.translation: （尤美-通常是金属或者木质的）桶；提桶

entries.translation: 差的；下级的；低等的；级别/地位低的人；次品

examples.zh: 她的肩膀上披着一条经过多次修补的披肩，她的肩膀上搭着一条被多重缝补的披肩

entries.translation: 纺；（使）旋转；高速旋转；（乘车）兜风

examples.zh: 我们在城里转了一圈

definitions.definition: 补丁，（与周围不同的）小片

entries.translation: 补丁，（与周围不同的）小片；补缀

examples.en: She sewed a patch onto the knee of the trousers 她在裤子的膝部缝了个补丁

entries.translation: 民意调查；选举投票；投票数

examples.en: A public opinion poll shows that most people see the protectionist policies negatively
examples.zh: 民意调查显示，大多数人对保护主义政策持负面看法

definitions.definition: ethics 道德规范，伦理标准

entries.translation: 行为准则；ethics 道德规范，伦理标准

examples.en: Merchants must observe their code of ethics
examples.zh: 商家必须遵守道德准则

examples.en: I suggested him tackle the problem in another way
examples.zh: 我建议他用另一种方式解决这个问题

examples.zh: 她就经济事务向政府提供建议

examples.zh: 当她说她累了时，这是暗示她想让我们离开

examples.zh: 他宣称他再也不会回来了

examples.zh: 嫌疑人确认他一整天都在家

entries.translation: 声称；主张；索赔/声称；要求（拥有）

examples.en: Every citizen may claim the protection of the law
examples.zh: 每个公民都可以要求法律的保护

examples.zh: 他的口音表明他是美国人

examples.zh: 政府宣布他们将修建一条通往该地区的新高速公路

examples.en: The agents are monitoring the enemy's radio broadcasts to try to find out their secret plans
examples.zh: 特工们正在监听敌人的无线电广播，试图找出他们的秘密计划

examples.zh: 商人决定用骆驼运送货物穿越沙漠

examples.zh: 这对新夫妇花了一些钱购买新房所需的家具

entries.translation: （公司、组织的）收入；（政府的）税收

examples.en: State universities in the US get most of their revenue from taxes
examples.zh: 美国州立大学的大部分收入来自税收

examples.en: GDP stands for Gross Domestic Product
examples.zh: GDP代表国内生产总值

entries.translation: 沮丧；消沉；萧条期；不景气

examples.zh: 假期可能有助于他应对抑郁情绪

examples.zh: 当前的贸易逆差表明我国进出口严重失衡

examples.zh: 去书店的人似乎逐渐减少

entries.translation: 减少；减小/（使）减少；（使）减小

examples.zh: 她对这个科目的兴趣逐渐减弱

examples.zh: 工厂必须缩小规模并更充分地利用剩余工人

examples.en: The prices in the shop have been reduced, so it's a good time to buy
examples.zh: 商店里的价格已经降低了，所以现在是购买的好时机

examples.zh: 你的薪水将是每年 12, 000，每年增加 500 美元

examples.zh: 知识的获取是一项社会活动

examples.zh: 你给我钱，我给你货

examples.zh: 船舶正在卸货

examples.zh: 他的才华和奉献精神将确保他的成功

entries.translation: 担保；确保/保证；保修单；担保金；担保物

examples.en: They offer a two-year guarantee on all their household appliances
examples.zh: 他们为所有家用电器提供两年保修

examples.zh: 仅凭外表来判断一个人是可靠的

examples.zh: 我们对谈判的顺利进行感到满意

examples.zh: 很多人参加了她的生日聚会

entries.translation: 缺席的；不在场的；心不在焉的

examples.zh: 丹尼尔第二天一整天都不在家

examples.en: The store discounted all air conditioners for sale
examples.zh: 本店所有空调均打折出售

examples.en: These wholesale dealers earned a large sum of money
examples.zh: 这些批发商赚了大笔钱

examples.en: His house was sold at an auction
examples.zh: 他的房子在拍卖会上被卖掉

examples.en: They lost the contract because their bid was too high
examples.zh: 他们因为出价太高而失去了合同

entries.translation: 买卖；[~ with]处理；应付/协议；交易；大量

examples.en: I'll deal with the children later
examples.zh: 以后我会处理孩子们的事情

examples.zh: 由于卖家和买家管理商业交易，因此公司可以与客户保持联系

examples.zh: 年营业额约8亿英镑

examples.zh: 有些人直接把垃圾倒进河里

examples.zh: 石油已取代咖啡成为我们的主要出口产品

examples.zh: 我们每年从其他国家进口大量农产品

examples.en: The committee reversed its decision on the import quota
examples.zh: 委员会推翻了关于进口配额的决定

entries.translation: 股份，股票；一份/分享；共享；分担

examples.en: He has put all his money in stocks and shares
examples.zh: 他把所有的钱都投入了股票

examples.en: A large number of students will benefit from the new teaching method
examples.zh: 大量学生将受益于新的教学方式

entries.translation: 兴趣；利益；利息/使感兴趣

examples.zh: 您必须支付该贷款的利息

examples.en: All stock prices have jumped up this month
examples.zh: 本月所有股票价格均上涨

examples.en: Have you got a bank account?
examples.zh: 你有银行账户吗？

examples.zh: 活期存款账户利息低于存款账户利息

examples.zh: 分期购买商品近年已成流行

examples.zh: 银行兑现了我的支票

examples.zh: 我们最好不要创造难以理解的术语

examples.zh: 五便士等于一先令

examples.zh: 老太太去世时留下了300万英镑的遗产

examples.zh: 这个女孩从她姑妈那里得到了一笔小遗产

examples.zh: 据说她是法国贵族家庭的后裔

entries.translation: 很值钱的；贵重的；很重要的

examples.zh: 他的妻子戴上了她珍贵的戒指和项链

examples.zh: 便宜的鞋子很快就会磨损

examples.zh: 不同国家和地区的激励措施有所不同

examples.zh: 良好的经济政策可以加速社会的经济增长

examples.zh: 她的工作是月薪三千美元

examples.zh: 许多工作人员指责收入分配不公平

examples.zh: 这些工人要求加薪5%

entries.translation: 支付；支付的款项；付款额

examples.zh: 他话还没说完，就有人站起来反驳他的观点，他还没说完，就有人起来驳斥驳斥他的观点

examples.zh: 大象大多数时候都很温顺，但它们也可能非常野蛮

examples.zh: 那个敌方军官是魔鬼的化身他是恶魔的化身

examples.zh: 部队从被占领的城市撤退

examples.zh: 会议在非常友好的气氛中进行

examples.zh: 根据国家宪法，所有的年轻人都应该服一年兵役

examples.zh: 如今，越来越多的人更喜欢核心家庭而不是标准家庭

examples.zh: 这位军医挽救了一名战友的生命，并帮助疏散了许多其他受伤的士兵

entries.translation: 马夫；新郎/（给动物）刷洗；理毛；梳毛

examples.en: The head groom is responsible for seeing that his stable mates have safe journeys
examples.zh: 马夫负责确保他的马厩伙伴旅途安全

examples.en: A British hostage was held hostage for over two years
examples.zh: 一名英国人质被扣押两年多

definitions.definition: 苦工，苦活，网，圈套/辛勤劳作，苦干

entries.translation: 苦工，苦活，网，圈套/辛勤劳作，苦干

examples.en: They spent months of toil on the water conservation project
examples.zh: 他们为节水工程花费了数月的辛劳

examples.en: He tossed the beggar a handful of coins
examples.zh: 他扔给乞丐一把硬币

examples.en: Slaves were mercilessly ground down by slave owners
examples.zh: 奴隶被奴隶主无情地践踏

examples.en: He is a liar and a coward to boot
examples.zh: 他是个骗子，而且是个胆小鬼

examples.en: Dreaming is one thing, but acting is another
examples.zh: 梦想是一回事，行动又是另一回事

examples.en: The children must behave in a way which would be socially acceptable
examples.zh: 孩子们的行为方式必须为社会所接受

examples.zh: 行动高于言语和思想

examples.en: They have to accustom themselves to the hot weather
examples.zh: 他们必须让自己适应炎热的天气

examples.en: An acid can react with an alkali to form a salt
examples.zh: 酸可以与碱反应生成盐

examples.en: I offered him a drink, but he didn't respond
examples.zh: 我请他喝一杯，但他没有回应

examples.en: Her look reflected the thought passing though her mind
examples.zh: 她的表情反映了她脑海中闪过的想法

examples.en: They adopted our effective methods
examples.zh: 他们采用了我们有效的方法

examples.en: Milk could nourish a baby
examples.zh: 牛奶可以滋养婴儿

examples.en: I want to have my garden mowed
examples.zh: 我想要修剪我的花园

entries.translation: 支撑；支持；供养/支持；帮助

examples.en: We should encourage and support them to participate in collective activities with friends, family, colleagues and support groups
examples.zh: 我们应该鼓励和支持他们与朋友、家人、同事和支持团体一起参加集体活动

examples.en: Take a deep breath then exhale slowly
examples.zh: 深吸一口气，然后慢慢呼气

examples.en: He heard a sharp intake of breath
examples.zh: 他听到急促的呼吸声

examples.en: The fresh air soon revived him
examples.zh: 新鲜空气很快让他苏醒过来

examples.en: The man was very ill, but he survived
examples.zh: 这个人病得很重，但他活了下来

entries.translation: 怒目而视；发出强光/刺眼的光；怒视

examples.en: The glare of the oncoming headlights temporarily blinded me
examples.zh: 迎面而来的车灯的眩光暂时让我失明

examples.en: I caught a glimpse of our new neighbor
examples.zh: 我瞥见了我们的新邻居

examples.en: The man glanced at the burglar climbing out of the window
examples.zh: 那人看了一眼爬出窗外的窃贼

examples.en: I peeped through the window to see if she was there
examples.zh: 我透过窗户偷看她是否在那儿

examples.en: The child gazed at the toys in the shop window
examples.zh: 孩子盯着商店橱窗里的玩具

definitions.definition: 盯着看/同等地位的人，同辈

entries.translation: 凝视；盯着看/同等地位的人，同辈

examples.en: The new postman peered through the mist, trying to find the right house
examples.zh: 新邮递员透过薄雾凝视着，试图找到合适的房子

examples.en: He stared at the word, trying to remember what it meant
examples.zh: 他盯着这个词，试图记住它的意思

examples.en: The young surgeon contemplated the difficult operation of kidney transplant
examples.zh: 年轻外科医生思考肾移植手术的难度

examples.en: The couple made their wedding vows at Saint Paul's church
examples.zh: 这对夫妇在圣保罗教堂宣誓结婚

examples.en: He swore an oath to support and protect the king
examples.zh: 他发誓支持和保护国王

examples.en: The conflicts continued in spite of a no strike pledge by the unions
examples.zh: 尽管工会承诺不罢工，冲突仍在继续

entries.translation: 口哨；哨子；汽笛声/吹口哨；吹哨子

examples.en: The referee blew the whistle at the end of the game
examples.zh: 裁判吹响了比赛结束的哨声

examples.en: He tried to reply and then stopped
examples.zh: 他试图回答，然后停了下来

examples.en: I notified him that the meeting had been postponed
examples.zh: 我通知他会议推迟了

entries.translation: 断言，坚称；坚持（自己的）主张

examples.en: Justice will assert itself
examples.zh: 正义将会伸张正义

examples.en: He explained his plan in detail
examples.zh: 他详细地解释了他的计划

examples.en: We had a quarrel about the price
examples.zh: 我们因为价格发生了争执

examples.en: A long dispute means that both parties are wrong
examples.zh: 争论时间长说明双方都有错

examples.en: We accepted the agreement without argument
examples.zh: 我们没有争论就接受了协议

examples.en: As for that film you mentioned, not my scene
examples.zh: 至于你提到的那部电影，不是我的场景

examples.en: I'm in no hurry to get back to school
examples.zh: 我不急着回学校

examples.en: It was now obvious that she was hastening to restore the car to its owner
examples.zh: 现在很明显，她正在抓紧时间把车还给车主。

examples.en: They urged Washington to reconsider its decision
examples.zh: 他们敦促华盛顿重新考虑其决定

examples.en: Don't scold the children without reason
examples.zh: 不要无缘无故地责骂孩子

examples.en: A light purse is a heavy curse 贫穷是沉重的诅咒
examples.zh: 轻钱包是重诅咒

examples.en: He had to swear that his story was true
examples.zh: 他必须发誓他的故事是真实的

examples.en: Mind you, that dog is very dangerous when provoked
examples.zh: 请注意，那只狗被激怒时非常危险

examples.en: He was always preaching about the benefits of exercise and fresh air
examples.zh: 他总是宣扬锻炼和新鲜空气的好处

examples.en: Nobody should boast of his knowledge
examples.zh: 没有人应该夸耀自己的知识

examples.en: If you always tease others like that, you'll forfeit the good opinions of your friends
examples.zh: 如果你总是这样取笑别人，你就会失去朋友的好感

entries.translation: 嘲笑；嘲弄/模拟的；假装的

examples.en: They mocked at my timidity
examples.zh: 他们嘲笑我的胆怯

examples.en: By the way, you don't want to touch the onion and then touch your eyes
examples.zh: 顺便说一下，你不想先摸洋葱再摸眼睛

examples.en: He hugged his daughter tightly
examples.zh: 他紧紧地抱住女儿

examples.en: Let's give the children a big clap
examples.zh: 让我们给孩子们一个大大的掌声

examples.en: Everyone applauded when the play ended
examples.zh: 演出结束时大家都鼓掌

examples.en: The man knelt down to say his pray
examples.zh: 那人跪下祈祷

examples.en: It is natural for a cat to catch mice
examples.zh: 猫抓老鼠是天性

examples.en: The snatched the book from my hands
examples.zh: 他们从我手里抢走了书

examples.en: She grabbed the seat near the fire before I could
examples.zh: 她抢在我之前抢到了靠近火炉的座位

entries.translation: 抓牢 ，握紧；完全理解，全面领会

examples.en: A man who grasps at too much may lose everything
examples.zh: 一个人抓的太多可能会失去一切

examples.en: I had to drive very fast to overtake you
examples.zh: 我必须开得很快才能超越你

entries.translation: 跟随；是...的必然结果；遵循

examples.en: You are to follow his advice
examples.zh: 你要听从他的建议

entries.translation: 紧握，抓牢/紧握，抓牢；理解，了解

examples.en: She has a fragile grip on reality
examples.zh: 她对现实的把握很脆弱

examples.en: Your books and magazines are all in a mess; go and put them in order.
examples.zh: 你的书和杂志都乱七八糟；去把它们整理好。

examples.en: Twist the lid to open it
examples.zh: 旋转盖子将其打开

examples.en: The crowd scattered when a dustbin suddenly exploded
examples.zh: 垃圾桶突然爆炸，人群四散

examples.en: She folded the letter so that it would fit into her bag
examples.zh: 她把信折好，以便能放进她的包里

examples.en: Please fasten your seatbelts while the plane is taking off
examples.zh: 飞机起飞时请系好安全带

examples.en: My belt is too tight. I must loosen it
examples.zh: 我的皮带太紧了。我必须松开它

entries.translation: 打碎；（使）猛烈撞击；（打球时）扣球

examples.en: Although the bed was smashed to pieces, the man was miraculously unhurt
examples.zh: 虽然床被砸碎了，但男子却奇迹般地没有受伤

entries.translation: 擦破，刮坏；搔/乱涂；划痕，擦伤

examples.en: He scratched the insect bite on his arm
examples.zh: 他抓破了手臂上被虫咬的地方

examples.en: She wiped off dust with a rag
examples.zh: 她用抹布擦去了灰尘

entries.translation: 刮掉；擦坏；勉强获得/刮；擦伤

examples.en: The family has to scrape by on social security
examples.zh: 一家人只能依靠社会保障勉强度日

examples.en: Silver can be easily polished with this special cloth
examples.zh: 用这种特殊的布可以轻松擦拭银器

examples.en: The crowd split into several groups
examples.zh: 人群分成了几组

examples.en: Swaying hips properly is the basis of the heel-and-toe walking race
examples.zh: 正确摆动臀部是跟趾竞走的基础

examples.en: The movie didn't give me any kind of shake
examples.zh: 这部电影没有给我任何震撼

examples.en: Some insects' wings vibrate so fast that the movement is invisible to human eyes
examples.zh: 有些昆虫的翅膀振动得如此之快，以至于人眼看不见这种运动

examples.zh: 他在院子里转来转去

examples.en: You can rotate the wheel with your hand
examples.zh: 您可以用手转动轮子

entries.translation: 洗（牌）；拖着脚走；搅乱...的次序/洗牌

examples.en: With sore legs and aching chest, he shuffled over to the bathroom
examples.zh: 腿酸胸口酸，他拖着脚步走向卫生间。

examples.en: In running around the corner, he collided with another man
examples.zh: 在拐角处奔跑时，他与另一名男子相撞

examples.en: This remote tribe had little contact with the outside world
examples.zh: 这个偏僻的部落与外界接触很少

examples.en: Has the phone been connected yet?
examples.zh: 手机已经连接了吗？

examples.en: Carbon, hydrogen, and oxygen can combine to form carbohydrates and fats
examples.zh: 碳、氢和氧可以结合形成碳水化合物和脂肪

examples.en: Little attempt was made to integrate the parts into a coherent whole
examples.zh: 几乎没有尝试将各个部分整合成一个连贯的整体

examples.en: Western ideas penetrate slowly through the east
examples.zh: 西方思想慢慢渗透到东方

entries.translation: 刺穿，刺破，穿透；使心如刀割

examples.en: The needle pierced the material
examples.zh: 针刺穿材料

examples.en: He inserted the key into the lock but could not open the door
examples.zh: 他把钥匙插入锁中，但打不开门

examples.en: I tilted the cup to drink out of it
examples.zh: 我倾斜杯子喝了它

examples.en: We towed the car to the garage
examples.zh: 我们把车拖到车库

examples.en: The carriage drove along a dirt road and left a trail of dust
examples.zh: 马车沿着土路行驶，留下了尘土的痕迹

examples.en: Contact your local branch to arrange an appointment
examples.zh: 联系您当地的分行安排预约

examples.en: He uses his credit to manipulate his supporters
examples.zh: 他利用自己的信誉来操纵他的支持者

examples.en: He steered the ship carefully among the reefs
examples.zh: 他小心翼翼地驾驶着船在珊瑚礁之间航行

examples.en: It transpired that Mark had been baptized a catholic
examples.zh: 据了解，马克已受洗成为天主教徒

entries.translation: 下注；打赌；敢说/打赌；赌注

examples.en: I bet our team will win
examples.zh: 我打赌我们队会赢

examples.en: I'd stake my all on it
examples.zh: 我愿意赌上我的一切

examples.en: Don't gamble with your future
examples.zh: 不要拿你的未来做赌注

examples.en: I hope you'll keep your promise to come for a long visit
examples.zh: 我希望你能信守长期来访的承诺

examples.en: She was attracted by the novel advertisement
examples.zh: 她被新颖的广告所吸引

examples.en: He became absolutely obsessed with the girl in red
examples.zh: 他对红衣女孩彻底着迷了

examples.en: I stood by the lake, mesmerized by the flashing colors of the fish
examples.zh: 我站在湖边，被鱼儿闪烁的色彩迷住了

examples.en: This mid-term exam is a nightmare
examples.zh: 这次期中考试是一场噩梦

examples.en: John amazed his friends by suddenly getting married
examples.zh: 约翰突然结婚，令他的朋友们大吃一惊

definitions.definition: 感到惊讶，大为赞叹/奇迹

entries.translation: 感到惊讶，大为赞叹/奇迹

examples.en: I marvel at how it can be so
examples.zh: 我很惊讶怎么会这样

examples.en: We were astonished to hear that their football team had won the championship
examples.zh: 听说他们的足球队赢得了冠军，我们感到很惊讶

examples.en: This forum will involve people with specialist knowledge
examples.zh: 该论坛将邀请具有专业知识的人士参与

examples.en: Sometimes we annoy or upset others unintentionally
examples.zh: 有时我们无意中惹恼或惹恼了别人

entries.translation: 使心烦意乱；使生气；搅乱；打翻

examples.en: I hope I haven't said anything to upset you
examples.zh: 我希望我没有说任何让你不高兴的话

examples.en: A new environment can bewilder and frighten a child
examples.zh: 新的环境会让孩子感到困惑和害怕

entries.translation: 反话；有讽刺意味的情形

examples.en: The irony is that some of the poorest countries have the richest natural resources
examples.zh: 讽刺的是，一些最贫穷的国家却拥有最丰富的自然资源

examples.en: The soldiers who were captured had to endure many indignities at the hands of the enemy
examples.zh: 被俘的士兵不得不忍受敌人的许多侮辱

examples.en: A liar is held in contempt 说谎者为人所轻视
examples.zh: 说谎者为人所轻视

examples.en: In course of time, old customs and observances tend to fall into neglect
examples.zh: 随着时间的推移，古老的习俗和仪式往往会被忽视

examples.en: Disregarding all difficulties, we succeeded in bringing them around in the end
examples.zh: 我们不顾一切困难，最终成功地扭转了局面

examples.en: Where ignorance is bliss, 'tis folly to be wise
examples.zh: 无知是福，智慧却是愚蠢

entries.translation: 使有偏见；使偏心/偏见；偏心

examples.en: His experiences bias him against businessmen
examples.zh: 他的经历使他对商人产生偏见

examples.en: His statement deviates from the truth
examples.zh: 他的说法与事实有偏差

examples.en: The pupil was expelled for stealing
examples.zh: 学生因偷窃被开除

examples.en: Follow love and it will flee, flee love and it will follow thee
examples.zh: 追随爱，它会逃离，逃离爱，它会追随你

examples.en: He's always bullying smaller boys
examples.zh: 他总是欺负小男孩

examples.en: When the theater caught fire, there was a panic
examples.zh: 剧院失火后，一片恐慌

examples.en: Her husband's violence terrified her
examples.zh: 丈夫的暴力行为让她感到害怕

examples.en: Hamlet took revenge for his father's murder
examples.zh: 哈姆雷特为父亲报仇

examples.en: A businessman has been kidnapped
examples.zh: 一名商人被绑架

definitions.definition: 劫持（飞机或其他交通工具）

entries.translation: 劫持（飞机或其他交通工具）

examples.en: The terrorists hijacked the plane and held all the passengers hostage
examples.zh: 恐怖分子劫持了飞机并将所有乘客扣为人质

examples.en: He was caught smuggling cameras into the country
examples.zh: 他因走私相机进入该国而被捕

examples.en: He was convicted of murder
examples.zh: 他被判犯有谋杀罪

examples.en: The economist argues that high taxation strangles the economy
examples.zh: 经济学家认为高税收会扼杀经济

examples.en: The massacre of Jews by Nazi in World War II was appalling
examples.zh: 二战纳粹对犹太人的屠杀令人震惊

entries.translation: 大批杀死，大量毁灭；大大削弱

examples.en: Those policies resulted in a decimation of essential services used by the poor
examples.zh: 这些政策导致穷人使用的基本服务大量减少

examples.en: I shall leave on Sunday if nothing intervenes
examples.zh: 如果没有什么事的话我会在周日离开

examples.en: Nothing can impede his progress
examples.zh: 没有什么能够阻碍他的进步

examples.en: Those unwary investors are allured by promises of quick profits
examples.zh: 那些粗心的投资者被快速获利的承诺所吸引

definitions.definition: 使上当发火/诱饵，诱惑物

entries.translation: 使上当发火/诱饵，诱惑物

examples.en: He is known for baiting his opponents. 众所周知，他善于激怒对手
examples.zh: 他以引诱对手而闻名。 高贵，他善于激怒对手

examples.en: Nothing shall induce me to join their club
examples.zh: 没有什么能诱使我加入他们的俱乐部

examples.en: Apply generous amounts of sunscreen 15 minutes before you go out. Don't allow impatience to tempt you into sunburn
examples.zh: 出门前 15 分钟涂抹大量防晒霜。不要让不耐烦引诱您晒伤

examples.en: He designated Smith as his successor
examples.zh: 他指定史密斯为他的继任者

examples.en: It is not possible to assign this building an exact date
examples.zh: 无法为该建筑分配准确的日期

examples.en: His part-time job on Sunday was to distribute leaflets on the street
examples.zh: 他周日的兼职工作是在街上发传单

examples.en: He dispatched his breakfast and left
examples.zh: 他送完早餐就离开了

examples.en: He had to detach himself from social activities for the time being in order to concentrate on his studies
examples.zh: 他不得不暂时脱离社交活动，以便专心学习

examples.en: He finally managed to undo this knot
examples.zh: 他终于解开了这个结

entries.translation: 掩饰；假扮；伪装/假扮；伪装物

examples.en: The spy disguised himself as a nurse
examples.zh: 间谍伪装成护士

examples.en: He was unable to conceal his surprise
examples.zh: 他无法掩饰自己的惊讶

examples.en: Jonah's mother refused to let him go abroad
examples.zh: 约拿的母亲拒绝让他出国

examples.en: They excluded people under 18 to join the club
examples.zh: 他们排除 18 岁以下的人加入俱乐部

entries.translation: 颠倒；彻底改变；撤销/相反的情况；反面/相反的

examples.en: He reversed the judgement and set the prisoner free
examples.zh: 他推翻了判决并释放了囚犯

examples.en: I can assure you of the reliability of the news
examples.zh: 我可以向你保证消息的可靠性

examples.en: The developed countries should undertake the main responsibilities of global warming
examples.zh: 发达国家应承担全球变暖的主要责任

examples.en: We have stipulated a date of payment and a price
examples.zh: 我们已经规定了付款日期和价格

examples.en: He finally convinced us of his innocence
examples.zh: 他终于让我们相信他是清白的

examples.en: When the child was afraid in the storm, his parents reassured him
examples.zh: 当孩子在暴风雨中感到害怕时，父母安慰他

examples.en: I wish it to be clearly understood
examples.zh: 我希望它能被清楚地理解

examples.en: These college graduates aspire to careers in finance
examples.zh: 这些大学毕业生渴望从事金融职业

examples.en: He desired a college education
examples.zh: 他渴望接受大学教育

examples.en: The children who had been abducted and sold yearned to return to their homes
examples.zh: 被拐卖的孩子们渴望回到自己的家

entries.translation: 唤起（情感等）；向...祈求帮助；恳求

examples.en: The man despaired and invoked to gods
examples.zh: 男人绝望了，向诸神求助

examples.en: I've gotten itch on my back
examples.zh: 我的背很痒

examples.en: He studied hard in an attempt to pass the exam
examples.zh: 他努力学习以试图通过考试

examples.en: Our effects were unveiling
examples.zh: 我们的效果正在揭晓

examples.en: We're determined to fulfill the task
examples.zh: 我们决心完成任务

examples.en: We must sort out the good apples from the bad ones
examples.zh: 我们必须把好苹果和坏苹果挑出来

definitions.definition: （庞然大物或形状模糊之物）隐现

entries.translation: （庞然大物或形状模糊之物）隐现；逼近/织布机

examples.en: A hard struggle looms ahead
examples.zh: 一场艰苦的斗争即将来临

examples.en: Full market research is needed before a new proudct is launched
examples.zh: 新产品推出前需要进行全面的市场调查

examples.en: I will commence around a visit
examples.zh: 我将从访问开始

examples.en: They plan to exploit oil under the sea
examples.zh: 他们计划在海底开采石油
